Thanks for reading the source — that's exactly what it's published for.

**Daisy doesn't accept pull requests.** The project is source-visible but not
community-run (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)), so this PR will be
closed without review.

If you found a bug or have an improvement in mind, please
[open an issue](../../issues/new) instead — we read all of them, and a clear
issue is the fastest way to get a fix into an official release.
